title: Guided first-run setup: instructions and links in the Twilio connection screen

preflight.note: Created before editing the renderer onboarding screen, styles, or rebuilding for this UX change.

acceptance_criteria.text: The first-run connection screen explains where to find each Twilio value and links out to Twilio signup and the Console, so an unfamiliar user is not stuck.

Only the three Twilio values are first-run fields; Public webhook URL, Local host, and Local port are moved into a collapsed Advanced section noted as managed automatically (webhook is inbound-only and optional), so the user is not asked to configure anything except Twilio.
Field labels are unchanged, the renderer builds, and the existing renderer interaction tests pass.
No personal data is hardcoded into the UI; only generic placeholders and official Twilio links ship.
